sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96485" key="stenokori/asis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στενο-κορίᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<sense id="n96485.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόρη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unnatural contraction of the pupil</tr_>, Veget.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
